recommendations.title: I babysitter
recommendations.overview: On Andrea's birthday, his boss asks him to babysit his son while he's away for work: while Andrea is babysitting, his friends arrive and throw a big party.

recommendations.title: The Big Country
recommendations.overview: Retired wealthy sea captain Jim McKay arrives in the Old West, where he becomes embroiled in a feud between his future father-in-law, Major Terrill, and the rough and lawless Hannasseys over a valuable patch of land.

recommendations.title: Water and Fire

recommendations.title: Romeo & Juliet

recommendations.title: The Prince & Me 2: The Royal Wedding

recommendations.title: Anne of the Thousand Days
recommendations.overview: Henry VIII of England discards his wife, Katharine of Aragon, who has failed to produce a male heir, in favor of the young and beautiful Anne Boleyn.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Batman: Mask of the Phantasm
